input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.8.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.8.3.3
            TITLE: for items which cannot be verified by an inspector, the team must provide documentation,

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.8.3.3: For items which cannot be verified by an inspector, the team must provide documentation,
IN.8.3.3 For items which cannot be verified by an inspector, the team must provide documentation, 
visual and/or written, that the requirements have been met.

final_answer: For items which cannot be verified by an inspector, the team must provide documentation, visual and/or written, that the requirements have been met.
